description: Install a Locus plugin from a configured registry, a local plugin path, an archive URL, or a GitHub source. Use this in the /plugin workflow only after the user has identified the target clearly or confirmed a search result and install scope.

pluginId.description: Registry plugin id to install. Use this for registry installs after the id is known.

registryBaseUrl.description: Optional registry base URL override for pluginId installs. Omit to resolve the plugin id across the registries configured in Locus, in configured order; the official Locus registry is used when none are configured.

expectedPluginId.description: Expected plugin id when installing from source, path, url, or repo.

scope.description: Install scope. Use app for user-wide plugins and project for the current workspace.

source.description: Advanced source object matching PluginDownloadSource. Use when path, url, or repo shortcut fields are insufficient.

type.description: Source kind: local, url, repo, branch, tag, commit, release, latestRelease, auto.

path.description: Local plugin directory or .zip archive path.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/name form or a git URL.

tag.description: Git tag or GitHub release tag for repo installs.

asset.description: GitHub release asset name for release installs.

assetPattern.description: GitHub release asset glob pattern for versioned release assets, for example locus-workspace-*.zip.

version.description: Expected plugin version when installing from source.
